description.description: What this rule detects and why

kinds.description: Which audit event kinds this rule applies to

pattern.description: Regex pattern for behavioral rules — matches against event text

trigger.description: File path that triggers a companion check (e.g., src/diagram/render.ts)

companions.description: Files that should also be edited when the trigger file is edited

any.description: If true, ANY companion being edited satisfies the rule. If false, ALL must be edited.

order.description: If 'companion_first', the companion file must be edited BEFORE the trigger file (e.g., write tests before source code)

hook.description: Which CC hook this rule writes to when it fires

message.description: Message the AI agent sees when this rule fires

action.description: hook = write message to hook file (agent sees it), log = record in audit panel only
